articles.title: Bruins reportedly moving on from one of their assistant coaches
articles.description:
Jay Leach primarily ran Boston's defense and penalty kill this past season.

The post Bruins reportedly moving on from one of their assistant coaches appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins part ways with assistant coach Jay Leach after the recent season.
Leach was responsible for the team's defense and penalty kill strategies.
This change may affect the Bruins' performance in the upcoming season.

articles.title: How to cut energy bills? Massachusetts Senate, House disagree.
articles.description:
Massachusetts lawmakers are working to reduce residents’ energy bills, but the House and Senate have different approaches

The post How to cut energy bills? Massachusetts Senate, House disagree. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts lawmakers are debating energy bill reductions for residents.
The House and Senate propose differing strategies to address energy costs.
Disagreement may delay potential savings for Boston households facing high energy bills.

articles.title: NFL insider would be ‘surprised’ if Patriots don’t land A.J. Brown
articles.description:
"Would I be surprised if it didn't happen? I think I would be surprised if it didn't happen,"

The post NFL insider would be ‘surprised’ if Patriots don’t land A.J. Brown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NFL insider predicts Patriots will acquire A.J. Brown, enhancing their roster.
Brown's addition could significantly improve the team's offensive performance in the upcoming season.
Boston fans may see increased excitement and ticket sales if the trade occurs.
